title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Sonata Software Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Sonata Software Ventures Solutions - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Sonata Software Ventures Solutions in Coimbatore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Sonata Software Ventures Solutions:
Sonata Software Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sonata Software Ventures Solutions!
